title: galium pumilum subsp. papillosum
intro: Galium pumilum subsp. papillosum, also known as the 'papillosum bedstraw', is a subspecies of the Galium pumilum plant that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are beneficial in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Galium pumilum subsp. papillosum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Galium pumilum subsp. papillosum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
